ecosystem you want to shape?
- What are key trends?

ambitions? (3 x P)

• How big is the inefficiency?
• Why is it not solved yet?

of your platform solution?
• What are the key
transactions?

• What is your USP?
• How big is the market?
• What are the monetization strategies?
• How do you want to earn money?
- What is the business case?
• What is the cost structure?
• When to become profitable?
